purpose: Record a date-addressable HKJC racecard sample after PR-136 without promoting records. This file is not a calendar input.

sample_observation.source_role: Proves that at least one HKJC racecard page can be addressed by RaceNo, Racecourse, and racedate and can expose a race_time.

negative_or_incomplete_probes.meaning: Do not assume every RaceNo is retrievable through the same URL pattern yet.
Do not derive meeting first_race_time, last_race_time, or race_count from the single RaceNo=5 sample.

sample_proves: date/racecourse/race-number query parameters can return a HKJC racecard page for at least one race
race_time can be read from the official racecard header for that sample race
sample_does_not_prove: all races in the 2026-06-03 Happy Valley meeting are retrievable
all June 2026 HKJC meetings are retrievable with the same pattern
promotion_decision.last_race_time_definition: Final race start time, not meeting_end_time.

next_steps: Inspect page links, scripts, or network payloads to identify the full race-number set for 2026-06-03 Happy Valley.
Create a one-meeting sample only after every race_number/race_time row for the meeting is source-verified.
Promote HKJC to B+ only after all June 2026 meetings can be regenerated through a stable official route.
